scripts.dev: npm run build && concurrently "npm run preview --workspace=mfe-auth" "npm run preview --workspace=mfe-jobs" "npm run preview --workspace=mfe-cv" "npm run preview --workspace=mfe-hub" "npm run preview --workspace=shell"
scripts.build:mfes: npm run build --workspace=mfe-auth && npm run build --workspace=mfe-jobs && npm run build --workspace=mfe-cv && npm run build --workspace=mfe-hub
scripts.build: npm run build:mfes && npm run build --workspace=shell
